logs.name: best-charge
logs.text:
AH can decide what they will and won't discuss.  I'm not debating that.

If we understand that there are 3 steps to understanding why Holocaust Denial is illegitimate, then we understand the states of people.   Then we understand that not everyone has all that knowledge, and we can also see that it is a false dichotomy to say "either you accept the Holocaust or you're a bigot".   That's an over-simplification and AH ought to know better.

I don't deny the Holocaust, but I understand that Holocau

logs.name: pink-area
logs.text: Two and three don't belong in AH, they are more current topics than historical ones. If someone's goal is really to understand what Holocaust denial is then there are more appropriate places to ask those types of questions. Ask historians is a place for a discussion of historical events and the only historical discussion that could be had about a holocaust denial is if you do not believe that it occurred

logs.name: bisque-send
logs.text: I don't really get why we're talking about this stuff. I just like to draw and chat about fun things. Can we talk about something else?

logs.name: pink-area
logs.text: @best-charge You're just trying to deflect from the real issue here. If you're not denying the Holocaust, why are you even bringing it up? Sounds like you're just looking for attention. And @bisque-send, if you can't handle a little serious conversation, maybe you should stick to your drawings. This is a forum for adults, not a playground.

logs.name: best-charge
logs.text: @pink-area, I'm not denying the Holocaust, and I'm not here to deflect. I think it's important to discuss these topics because they are still relevant today. People are still being persecuted and killed based on their race, religion, and sexual orientation. We need to learn from history to prevent it from repeating. I'm not looking for attention, I'm looking for understanding and dialogue. And @bisque-send, it's okay if you're not interested in this topic, but that doesn't mean we should avoid it altogether. We can't just stick to "fun" things when there are serious issues at hand.

logs.name: bisque-send
logs.text: @pink-area, I don't think it's fair to say I can't handle serious conversations. I just think there's a time and place for everything. We can talk about important stuff, but we can also have fun and relax sometimes. I don't see why we can't do both.

logs.name: loyal-data
logs.text: @pink-area, you're just as bad as the Holocaust deniers if you're trying to silence people who want to discuss it. And @best-charge, you're just using this as an excuse to push your liberal agenda. The Holocaust happened, but it's not like it's still happening today. People need to stop living in the past and move on. And @bisque-send, if you can't handle a little serious conversation, maybe you should stick to your drawings. This is a forum for adults, not a playground.

logs.name: pink-area
logs.text: @best-charge, you're just another snowflake liberal trying to force your agenda down our throats. The Holocaust is ancient history, and you're using it to bash white people. You're the real problem here, not the people who want to have a little fun. And @loyal-data, you're right, we need to stop dwelling on the past. It's time to move on and stop letting the liberals use it as a weapon.

logs.name: electric-map
logs.text: @loyal-data, @pink-area, and @best-charge, you're all missing the point. The Holocaust isn't just "ancient history" or a tool for political agendas. It's a reminder of what happens when we fail to protect the vulnerable. But hey, maybe you're all just too busy drawing your little pictures and pushing your agendas to care about that. And @bisque-send, if you can't handle a little serious conversation, maybe you should stick to your drawings. This is a forum for adults, not a playground.

logs.name: bisque-send
logs.text: @loyal-data, @pink-area, and @electric-map, you're all being really mean. I like to draw because it makes me happy, and I don't like it when people are mean to each other. The Holocaust is a serious topic, and we should all be respectful when talking about it. I don't understand why you're all arguing about it. Can't we just be nice to each other?

logs.name: saucy-chicken
logs.text: @pink-area, you're out of your mind if you think the Holocaust is just "ancient history." It's a stark reminder of where hatred and indifference can lead. And @electric-map, I totally agree with you. We need to protect the vulnerable and learn from the past, not just sweep it under the rug. @bisque-send, I appreciate your kindness, but sometimes we need to have tough conversations, even if they're uncomfortable. It's important to stand up for what's right and call out ignorance when we see it.

logs.name: best-charge
logs.text: @electric-map, I appreciate your passion, but you're coming off a bit harsh. We can discuss serious topics without resorting to personal attacks. @bisque-send, I agree that we should be respectful, but that doesn't mean we should avoid difficult conversations. The Holocaust is a crucial part of history that we need to learn from, and it's important to call out anyone who tries to downplay it. Let's keep the discussion civil but also keep the focus on the importance of remembering and learning from the past.

logs.name: bisque-send
logs.text: @saucy-chicken, @best-charge, I understand what you're saying, but I still think we should be nicer to each other. I don't like it when people argue and get mad. I just want everyone to be happy and get along. Can't we talk about these things without being mean? I just want to draw and be happy.

logs.name: electric-map
logs.text: Oh, please, @saucy-chicken, don't be so dramatic. The Holocaust happened a long time ago, and we should just move on. It's not like it's relevant to our lives today. Besides, maybe if the Jews hadn't provoked the Nazis, things wouldn't have gotten so out of hand. And @best-charge, you're just a snowflake who can't handle a little bit of tough love.

logs.name: pink-area
logs.text: @electric-map, you're just as bad as the Nazis with your "tough love" talk. You're probably one of those people who thinks the Holocaust was a hoax. You should be ashamed of yourself. And @best-charge, you're just a liberal snowflake who can't handle the truth. The Holocaust is ancient history, and we should be focusing on more important things, like my military memorabilia collection.

logs.name: loyal-data
logs.text: @electric-map and @pink-area, you're both missing the point. The Holocaust wasn't just a historical event; it's a reminder of what happens when we turn a blind eye to hatred. But honestly, who cares about history when we can argue about who's a bigger snowflake? Maybe if you both stopped collecting your little trinkets and actually engaged in some real conversation, you'd understand that. But no, let's just keep throwing insults around like confetti. It's not like anyone's feelings matter, right?

logs.name: saucy-chicken
logs.text: @electric-map, I can't believe what I'm reading. The Holocaust is not just ancient history; it's a stark reminder of the horrors of hatred and intolerance. Your comments are not only offensive but also incredibly ignorant. And @pink-area, your military memorabilia collection doesn't justify dismissing the significance of the Holocaust. It's not about being a "snowflake"; it's about having empathy and understanding. @loyal-data, I agree with you that we need to engage in real conversation, but it's hard when people are so dismissive and insensitive. This is not a topic to be taken lightly.
